proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing thousands every month on manual proposal creation. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: While Gmail's email is designed for efficiency, proposal creation lags behind with 47-second automated generation now possible.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are not just inefficiencies; they are ongoing losses.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Gmail spends countless hours crafting proposals manually. Each hour wasted is an hour not spent improving email efficiencies.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean fewer deals closed. Every day a proposal sits unfinished is potential revenue slipping through Gmail's fingers.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistencies
problems.description: Manually created proposals risk brand inconsistency. Any off-brand proposal weakens Gmail's position as a leader in intuitive email.

problems.title: Resource Overload
problems.description: Manpower is stretched thin with manual proposals. Every employee hour spent on proposals is an hour not innovating Gmail's services.

problems.title: High Error Rates
problems.description: Human errors in proposals can lead to contract losses. Each mistake costs Gmail potential deals and damages trust.

problems.title: Lost Competitive Edge
problems.description: Proposals that lag behind competitors' speed can lose strategic deals. Every delay gives rivals an advantage.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Introducing an AI system that transforms Gmail's proposal process.

solutions.title: Rapid Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take too long to create manually. This system generates them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual efforts risk inconsistent branding. AI ensures every proposal aligns with Gmail's unique brand.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Human errors are common in manual proposals. AI minimizes errors and maximizes accuracy.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: Currently, valuable resources are tied up in proposal creation. Automating frees them for innovation.

solutions.title: Competitive Edge
solutions.description: Proposals lag behind competition. With AI, Gmail can stay ahead with quicker, flawless proposals.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Seamless Communication with Gmail's Intuitive Email Solutions.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Empower Acme Corp with 15 GB of storage and efficient email management. Enhance productivity and reduce spam with a tailored plan.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every missed email is a potential opportunity gone for Acme Corp.

problems.title: Missed Communications
problems.description: Without a reliable email solution, Acme Corp risks losing 30% of crucial client interactions. This directly impacts customer satisfaction and retention.

problems.title: Storage Limitations
problems.description: Limited email storage means 20% of important data could be lost or overlooked. This disrupts workflow and decision-making processes.

problems.title: High Spam Rate
problems.description: With an increased spam rate, 15% of Acme Corp's resources are wasted on irrelevant emails, affecting productivity and focus.

problems.title: Mobile Accessibility
problems.description: Lack of mobile access leads to 25% delayed responses, missing out on timely business opportunities.

problems.title: Data Security Risks
problems.description: Without robust security measures, Acme Corp faces a 40% higher risk of data breaches, threatening sensitive company information.

problems.title: Inefficient Collaboration
problems.description: Inadequate collaboration tools can result in a 35% decrease in team efficiency, slowing down project timelines.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Gmail's solutions are designed to turn these losses into gains for Acme Corp.

solutions.title: Gmail's Intuitive Email
solutions.description: Streamlines communication and ensures no email is missed. This boosts client interactions and satisfaction.

solutions.title: Mobile Access
solutions.description: Enables team members to respond swiftly from anywhere. This reduces response time and captures timely opportunities.

solutions.title: Enhanced Security
solutions.description: Protects sensitive data with advanced security features. Mitigates the risk of data breaches and enhances trust.

solutions.title: 15 GB Storage
solutions.description: Offers ample space for all important communications and files. This eliminates storage concerns and improves data management.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail offers a reliable, user-friendly email solution tailored for business needs.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Reliability
whyUsCards.description: Gmail is trusted by millions worldwide for its consistent performance and reliability.

whyUsCards.title: Seamless Integration
whyUsCards.description: Gmail easily integrates with existing systems, ensuring minimal disruption to your workflow.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Insights
whyUsCards.description: Leverage Gmail's reporting tools to gain insights into communication patterns and improve strategies.

whyUsCards.title: Dedicated Support
whyUsCards.description: Our dedicated support team is available to ensure your transition to Gmail is smooth and effective.

socialProof.label: Storage per user ensures capacity needs are met.
Increase in productivity reported by Gmail users.
